name: wiremcp-wki
description: WireMCP with the WOS WKI tshark Lua dissector.

interface.shortDescription: Network traffic MCP with the WOS WKI dissector.
interface.longDescription: Runs 0xKoda WireMCP through a repo-local tshark wrapper that loads tools/wireshark/wki.lua and keeps Wireshark runtime config under /tmp for Codex-compatible permissions.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use WireMCP WKI to inspect WOS network traffic or analyze a PCAP.
